title: His Supplication when his Provision was Stinted
fullText:
أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ ابْتَلَيْتَنَا فِي أَرْزَاقِنَا بِسُوءِ الظَّنِّ

O God, Thou hast tried us with distrust in our provisions

وَفِي آجَالِنَا بِطُولِ الأمَلِ

and the expectation of long lives,

حَتَّى الْتَمَسْنَا أَرْزَاقَكَ مِنْ عِنْدِ الْمَرْزُوقِينَ،

until we begged for provisions from those who are provided

وَطَمِعْنَا بِآمَالِنَا فِي أَعْمَارِ الْمُعَمَّرِينَ.

and craved in our expectations the life-spans of the long-lived!

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

So bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَهَبْ لَنَا يَقِيناً صَادِقاً تَكْفِينا بِهِ مِنْ مَؤونَةِ الطَّلَبِ،

give us a true certainty that will suffice us the burden of seeking,

وَأَلْهِمْنَا ثِقَةً خَالِصَةً تُعْفِينَا بِهَا مِنْ شِدَّةِ النَّصَبِ،

and inspire us with a sincere trust that will release us from the hardship of exertion!

وَاجْعَلْ مَا صَرَّحتَ بِهِ مِنْ عِدَتِكَ فِي وَحْيِكَ،

Let Thy clear promise in Thy Revelation

وَأَتْبَعْتَهُ مِنْ قَسَمِكَ فِي كِتَابِكَ

which Thou hast followed in Thy Book with Thy oath

قَاطِعاً لاهْتِمَامِنَا بِالرِّزْقِ الَّـذِيْ تَكَفَّلْتَ بِهِ

cut off our worry about the provision for which Thou hast made Thyself responsible

وَحَسْمَاً لِلاشْتِغَالِ بِمَا ضَمِنْتَ الْكِفَايَةَ لَهُ،

and sever our occupation with everything whose sufficiency Thou hast guaranteed!

فَقُلْتَ وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ الاصْـدَقُ

For Thou hast said - and Thy word is the most truthful truth

وَأَقْسَمْتَ وَقَسَمُكَ الأَبَرُّ الأَوْفى:

and Thou hast sworn - and Thy oath is the most kept and fulfilled

( وَفِي السَّمَاءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ )

"In the heaven are your provision and everything you are promised" (51:22)!

ثُمَّ قُلْتَ: ( فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ وَالأَرْضِ إنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مِثْلَ مَا أَنَّكُمْ تَنْطِقُوْنَ ).

And then Thou hast said, "So by the Lord of heaven and earth, it is as surely true as that you have speech" (51:23)!

which Thou hast followed in Thy Book with Thy oath
قَاطِعاً لاهْتِمَامِنَا بِالرِّزْقِ الَّـذِيْ تَكَفَّلْتَ بِهِ

and sever our occupation with everything whose sufficiency Thou hast guaranteed!
فَقُلْتَ وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ الاصْـدَقُ
For Thou hast said - and Thy word is the most truthful truth
وَأَقْسَمْتَ وَقَسَمُكَ الأَبَرُّ الأَوْفى:
and Thou hast sworn - and Thy oath is the most kept and fulfilled
( وَفِي السَّمَاءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ )
"In the heaven are your provision and everything you are promised" (51:22)!
ثُمَّ قُلْتَ: ( فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ وَالأَرْضِ إنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مِثْلَ مَا أَنَّكُمْ تَنْطِقُوْنَ ).
And then Thou hast said, "So by the Lord of heaven and earth, it is as surely true as that you have speech" (51:23)!

pairs.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ ابْتَلَيْتَنَا فِي أَرْزَاقِنَا بِسُوءِ الظَّنِّ

translations.text: O God, Thou hast tried us with distrust in our provisions
and the expectation of long lives,

pairs.arabic: حَتَّى الْتَمَسْنَا أَرْزَاقَكَ مِنْ عِنْدِ الْمَرْزُوقِينَ،

translations.text: until we begged for provisions from those who are provided
and craved in our expectations the life-spans of the long-lived!
So bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَهَبْ لَنَا يَقِيناً صَادِقاً تَكْفِينا بِهِ مِنْ مَؤونَةِ الطَّلَبِ،

translations.text: give us a true certainty that will suffice us the burden of seeking,

pairs.arabic: وَأَلْهِمْنَا ثِقَةً خَالِصَةً تُعْفِينَا بِهَا مِنْ شِدَّةِ النَّصَبِ،

translations.text: and inspire us with a sincere trust that will release us from the hardship of exertion!

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ مَا صَرَّحتَ بِهِ مِنْ عِدَتِكَ فِي وَحْيِكَ،

translations.text: Let Thy clear promise in Thy Revelation
which Thou hast followed in Thy Book with Thy oath

pairs.arabic: قَاطِعاً لاهْتِمَامِنَا بِالرِّزْقِ الَّـذِيْ تَكَفَّلْتَ بِهِ

pairs.arabic: وَحَسْمَاً لِلاشْتِغَالِ بِمَا ضَمِنْتَ الْكِفَايَةَ لَهُ،

translations.text: and sever our occupation with everything whose sufficiency Thou hast guaranteed!
For Thou hast said - and Thy word is the most truthful truth
and Thou hast sworn - and Thy oath is the most kept and fulfilled
"In the heaven are your provision and everything you are promised" (51:22)!

pairs.arabic: ثُمَّ قُلْتَ: ( فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ وَالأَرْضِ إنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مِثْلَ مَا أَنَّكُمْ تَنْطِقُوْنَ ).
